name: EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitMxcomLd

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SourceData AS (SELECT A.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, A.MBR_ID, A.CONSIS_MBR_ID, A.TRACEABILITY_FLD, A.MBR_DOB, A.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, A.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, A.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, A.MBR_GNDR, A.MBR_CONFITY_CD, A.ACCT, A.GRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_ID, A.COV_BEG_DT, A.COV_END_DT, A.MBR_RELSHP, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, A.SUB_ID, A.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, A.MBR_MED_COB_CD, A.MBR_PDX_COB_CD, A.DEDCT_CAT, A.MHCD_ENR_BNF, A.PDX_BNF_IN, A.MHCD_BNF_IN, A.MED_BNF_IN, A.HOSP_BNF_IN, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, A.PDX_BNF_TIERS, A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, A.PROD_SK, A.PROD_SH_NM, B.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, B.MID_EFF_DT_SK, B.END_EFF_DT_SK, B.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, B.MID_TERM_DT_SK, B.END_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR_SPLT A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK = B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK = B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK WHERE A.MBR_MED_COB_CD <> 'S' AND A.MBR_PDX_COB_CD <> 'S' AND B.MID_EFF_DT_SK <> 'NULL' AND B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD = 'XCOM'), TransStageVars AS (SELECT SourceData.*, CASE WHEN SourceData.MID_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svMidEff FROM SourceData) SELECT TransStageVars.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, TransStageVars.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, TransStageVars.MBR_ID, TransStageVars.CONSIS_MBR_ID, TransStageVars.TRACEABILITY_FLD, TransStageVars.MBR_DOB, TransStageVars.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, TransStageVars.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, TransStageVars.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, TransStageVars.MBR_GNDR, TransStageVars.MBR_CONFITY_CD, TransStageVars.ACCT, TransStageVars.GRP_ID, TransStageVars.SUBGRP_ID, CASE WHEN TransStageVars.svMidEff = 'Y' THEN dbo.trim_custom(TransStageVars.MID_EFF_DT_SK, '-', 'A') ELSE TransStageVars.COV_BEG_DT END AS COV_BEG_DT, CASE WHEN TransStageVars.svMidEff = 'Y' THEN dbo.trim_custom(TransStageVars.MID_TERM_DT_SK, '-', 'A') ELSE TransStageVars.COV_END_DT END AS COV_END_DT, TransStageVars.MBR_RELSHP, TransStageVars.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, TransStageVars.SUB_ID, TransStageVars.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, CASE WHEN TransStageVars.svMidEff = 'Y' THEN 'M' ELSE TransStageVars.MBR_MED_COB_CD END AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, CASE WHEN TransStageVars.svMidEff = 'Y' THEN 'M' ELSE TransStageVars.MBR_PDX_COB_CD END AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, TransStageVars.DEDCT_CAT, TransStageVars.MHCD_ENR_BNF, TransStageVars.PDX_BNF_IN, TransStageVars.MHCD_BNF_IN, TransStageVars.MED_BNF_IN, TransStageVars.HOSP_BNF_IN, TransStageVars.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, TransStageVars.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, TransStageVars.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, TransStageVars.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, TransStageVars.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, TransStageVars.PDX_BNF_TIERS, TransStageVars.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN TransStageVars.svMidEff = 'Y' THEN TransStageVars.MID_EFF_DT_SK ELSE TransStageVars.MBR_EFF_DT_SK END AS MBR_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN TransStageVars.svMidEff = 'Y' THEN TransStageVars.MID_TERM_DT_SK ELSE TransStageVars.MBR_TERM_DT_SK END AS MBR_TERM_DT_SK, TransStageVars.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, TransStageVars.MID_EFF_DT_SK, TransStageVars.END_EFF_DT_SK, TransStageVars.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, TransStageVars.MID_TERM_DT_SK, TransStageVars.END_TERM_DT_SK, 'I' AS UPDT_IN, TransStageVars.PROD_SK, TransStageVars.PROD_SH_NM FROM TransStageVars

Annotations:
Inner Join W_BHI_MBR_ENR to W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT to load W_BHI_MBR_ENR and Assign 'M' to MBR_MED_COB_CD and MBR_PDX_COB_CD
